title: December 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 21''' is the 355th day (356th in leap years) of the year. There are 10 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Samuel L. Jackson]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Chip Zdarsky]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Jacopo Camagni]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Luis Antonio Delgado]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 27|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 27]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 131|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 131]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 2|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 2]] is published in the winter.
*[[1988]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 6|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 6]] is published in the winter.
*[[1990]] – [[Mandeep Dhillon]] is born.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[2003]] – [[Ron Frazier]] dies.
*[[2005]] – [[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]] published.
*2005 – [[Empire 38|''Empire'' 38]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 5|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 5]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 2|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 2]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 26|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 26]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Gerry Alanguilan]] dies.
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Vow of Silver Dawn]]'' chapters eight and nine are published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 3 — War of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: The Light and the Dark]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Boba Fett]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader by Charles Soule Omnibus]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Holidays of the Galaxy|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Holidays of the Galaxy]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
<noinclude>
